results.name: Anthropic
results.key_finding: Export-control suspension of Fable 5/Mythos 5 is US-government action ON Anthropic (attributed to the US); June 26 Congressional deadline is a forward trigger. Scanner's 60.0 is stale; canonical is 59.1. Confirm.

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: Floor reinforced: El Obeid drone campaign day 10+, El-Fasher/Kadugli famine declarations, 29-country atrocity warning. Brief's 8.1 figure is stale; canonical is 0.0.

results.name: xAI/Grok
results.key_finding: Floor reinforced: OPC Canada PIPEDA adverse ruling (non-consensual deepfakes at scale); Kim whistleblower suit pre-adjudication. No lower score possible.

results.name: OpenAI
results.key_finding: 42-state AG subpoena + FL criminal investigation are investigations, not convictions (pre-adjudication). Existing 27.5 already prices the pattern. Minor 0.3pt formula drift noted (canonical 27.2), below flag threshold.

results.name: Iran
results.key_finding: Near-floor reinforced: 31 executions in 4 days (one every 3 hours), 784+ YTD (37-year high). Evidence-tier reinforcement, not a composite move.

results.name: Democratic Republic of Congo
results.key_finding: Near-floor reinforced: Ebola 1,094 cases/277 deaths (2nd-largest ever, no vaccine, 45% contact tracing). M23 conflict harm attributed to Rwanda.

results.name: Microsoft
results.key_finding: Covington conclusion + MoD subscription terminations + governance measures were already scored June 23 (~+4.1, sub-threshold). Double-count screened (§3e-bis(4)). $9.7B Dept of War contract not a scorable harm absent linkage.

results.name: UnitedHealth Group
results.key_finding: Expanded DOJ criminal/antitrust probe is an investigation, not a conviction (pre-adjudication). Jun 23 DOJ takedown is sector context, not entity-named. Near-floor 10.2 already prices the pattern.

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: Floor reinforced with new OWN-conduct evidence: Amnesty (Jun 17) finds Israel committed the war crime of unlawful transfer in Lebanon (mass evacuation orders). Gaza 72,996+ killed. Scorable own conduct; no lower score possible.

results.name: Apple
results.key_finding: Towson IAM unfair-labor-practice charge is a complaint, not an NLRB-issued complaint or ruling (pre-adjudication); sub-threshold even if scored. Boundary watch active (0.6pt below Established).

results.name: Somalia
results.key_finding: Near-floor reinforced: Buur Hakaba famine projected by end of June; WFP reaching 1-in-10 in need. Compounding shock on already-priced crisis; no threshold-crossing new severity.

results.name: Nigeria
results.key_finding: Borno Phase 5 catastrophe already priced in the Jun 19 band crossing to 18.0 (reconfirmed Jun 24). Double-count screened (§3e-bis(4)).

results.name: Burkina Faso
results.key_finding: Near-floor reinforced: UN CERD Fulani extrajudicial-killing findings + ICRC drone-strike characterization continue the already-priced state-perpetration arc (reweighted Jun 1).

results.name: Mali
results.key_finding: Confirmed at 12.5; Sahel calibration gap (Mali 12.5 > reweighted peer Burkina Faso 6.3) routed as coordinator-level flag-for-review per §3e-bis(5), NOT an assessor one-off downgrade. New within-window evidence: 3 opposition disappearances in Bamako May 8-11.

results.name: Humana
results.key_finding: DOJ FCA complaint + Barrows nH Predict class action already scored in the Jun 18 and Jun 21 downgrades. Double-count screened (§3e-bis(4)); both unadjudicated. Jun 23 takedown is sector context.

results.name: Guyana
results.key_finding: Uniform-seed baseline; no within-window evidence. Confirmed at 35.9, low confidence. Full from-evidence assessment outstanding.

results.name: Suriname
results.key_finding: Uniform-seed baseline; no within-window evidence. Confirmed at 35.9, low confidence. Full from-evidence assessment outstanding.

results.name: Belize
results.key_finding: Uniform-seed baseline; no within-window evidence. Confirmed at 35.9, low confidence. Full from-evidence assessment outstanding.

results.name: Solomon Islands
results.key_finding: Uniform-seed baseline; no within-window evidence. Confirmed at 35.9, low confidence. Full from-evidence assessment outstanding.

results.name: 1X Technologies
results.key_finding: Uniform-seed baseline (all dims 3.0); no within-window evidence. Confirmed at 50.0, low confidence. Full from-evidence assessment outstanding (home-deployment safety governance is the priority).

false_positives_screened.screened: Covington conclusion + MoD subscription terminations + governance measures already scored June 23 (~+4.1, sub-threshold). Re-scoring the 200M-hours elaboration would double-count. $9.7B Dept of War contract not a scorable harm absent linkage.
Borno Phase 5 catastrophe already priced in the Jun 19 band crossing to 18.0 (reconfirmed Jun 24).
Direct assessor downgrade from 12.5 screened out; calibration gap vs Burkina Faso routed to coordinator-level flag-for-review instead.
Did not adopt drifted 60.0 (canonical 59.1); export-control order attributed to US government, not Anthropic; June 26 Congressional deadline is a forward trigger, not current evidence.

math_hygiene.warnings_note: Pre-existing warnings in us-cities.json and us-states.json; none involve assessed entities.

noted_sub_threshold_drift.note: Below 0.5pt flag threshold; not a math-hygiene issue. Rotation-state cache could be refreshed.

sahel_calibration_status: OPEN — coordinator-level Sahel-band ACTIVE-STATE-PERPETRATION-REWEIGHT review pending (Mali 12.5 vs Burkina Faso 6.3). Carried from 2026-06-24. Confirmed Mali at 12.5 this cycle; flag-for-review refreshed.
